mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pronunciation_weak_points (recording_id, user_id, item_id, label, pronunciation_type, forgetting_score, recommendation, updated_at) VALUES (#{recordingId}, #{userId}, #{itemId}, #{label}, #{pronunciationType}, #{forgettingScore}, #{recommendation}, now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, item_id) DO UPDATE SET recording_id = EXCLUDED.recording_id, label = EXCLUDED.label, pronunciation_type = EXCLUDED.pronunciation_type, forgetting_score = EXCLUDED.forgetting_score, recommendation = EXCLUDED.recommendation, updated_at = now()
